item.label: Add summary_only flag to individual operations
item.summary: Add optional summary_only parameter to tm_state, tm_update, tm_batch_update for minimal response payloads

body:
# Description

Cancelled with `spec-008` after the owning request record was removed. Recreate this task under a new request if summary-only response support is resumed.

# Acceptance Criteria

Cancelled with parent specification.

# Notes

This task was never fleshed into implementation-ready detail before the request chain disappeared.
